full_text:
Cao Lin 曹霖
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Lin (曹霖). Treated well by Cao Rui. Abused his concubines and killed some of them. Cao Lin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Lin lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
